jsonLd.title: NSE is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at NSE are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NSE:
NSE is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSE!
